title: Exact Finite Vector Space Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite vector-space bad subspace replay plus QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Subspace additive-closure conflict where exact replay computes 10 + 01 = 11 outside the claimed subset, while the separate QF_UF artifact isolates the malformed membership claim.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite vector-space rows only when they add distinct finite-field, subspace, or linear-map solver pressure; keep basis-extension, dimension uniqueness, quotient-space, and arbitrary-field theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite vector-space tables as deterministic finite-function and equality obligations.
Replay subspace, span, linear-map, kernel, image, and rank-nullity witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the bad finite subspace replay row distinct from the checked QF_UF/Alethe additive-closure membership row once exact table replay identifies the missing sum.
Keep general vector-space, module, basis-extension, dimension, quotient-space, and linear-map theorems under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
